title: helianthemum alyssoides proles rugosum
intro: Helianthemum alyssoides proles rugosum, commonly known as the rough rock rose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. This plant is known for its small white or pink flowers and its use in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of Helianthemum alyssoides proles rugosum include its astringent, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems.
